race.description: Divalls Earthmoving Country Boosted Mdn Plate
race.comment: ROONAMI (10) was within striking distance when resuming at Bathurst but just lacked a fitness edge late. Improvement to come and gets a key booking in Alysha Collett. Should be getting off the mark this time. GRAYNITA (7) couldn't live up to market expectations fresh when sent out as favourite. Still lightly raced and is from a smart stable. Worth another chance. COOL AS TED (1) showed improvement in his second start when sticking on soundly into the placings at Bathurst. Needs to improve again but should. STARS AND SPANGLES (5) was only fair when resuming at the Sapphire Coast but should come on with that run under his belt and gets in well with the 2kg claim. Not forgetting.
